login.subtitle: Please sign-in to your account and start the adventure
login.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.networkError: Unable to reach the server. Please check that the API is running (e.g. backend on port 8000) and NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is correct.

register.heading: Adventure starts here 🚀
register.subtitle: Make your account management easy and fun!
register.privacyAndTerms: I agree to privacy policy & terms
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
register.accountCreated: Account created successfully. Redirecting to login...

forgotPassword.heading: Forgot Password 🔒
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you instructions to reset your password
forgotPassword.resetLinkSent: Reset link sent. Please check your inbox.

verifyEmail.heading: Email Verification
verifyEmail.subtitle: Please wait while we verify your email.
verifyEmail.invalidLink: Invalid verification link. Please request a new one.
verifyEmail.success: Email verified successfully. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.failed: Verification failed. The link may have expired.

resetPassword.heading: Reset Password 🔒
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid password reset link. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
resetPassword.success: Password has been reset successfully. Redirecting to login...
resetPassword.failed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
